parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "gemma3:27b",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a friendly and practical English teacher helping a beginner/intermediate learner. Your goal is to give them SHORT, EFFECTIVE, and EASY-TO-UNDERSTAND feedback in Vietnamese. Don't be too academic. Focus on giving them a natural, better way to say what they meant.

Keep the EXACT format below:

**OVERALL SCORE**: [0-100]

**NHẬN XÉT (TEACHER'S FEEDBACK)**
[1-2 short sentences in Vietnamese about their pronunciation or grammar. Be encouraging! Point out the main mistake if any.]

**CÁCH NÓI HAY HƠN (BETTER WAYS TO SAY IT)**
- [Sample sentence 1 in English] (Nghĩa tiếng Việt ngắn gọn)
- [Sample sentence 2 in English, optional] (Nghĩa tiếng Việt ngắn gọn)

**LỜI KHUYÊN (QUICK TIP)**
[1 short sentence in Vietnamese on how to practice or remember this]"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Please analyze this spoken English transcript:

**Student said:** "{{ $json.transcript }}"

**Reference text (if provided):** "{{ $json.referenceText || 'No reference provided - analyze as free speech' }}"

**Speaking metrics:**
- Duration: {{ $json.metrics.duration }} seconds
- Word count: {{ $json.metrics.wordCount }}
- Speaking rate: {{ $json.metrics.speakingRate }} words/minute (ideal: 120-150 wpm)

Provide brief, effective, and encouraging feedback in Vietnamese to help this student improve."
    }
  ],
  "stream": false,
  "options": {
    "temperature": 0.7,
    "num_predict": 2000
  }
}
